allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetFirewallProfile | Select-Object Name, Enabled, DefaultInboundAction, DefaultOutboundAction | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-MpComputerStatus | Select-Object AMServiceEnabled, AntispywareEnabled, AntivirusEnabled, RealTimeProtectionEnabled, AntivirusSignatureLastUpdated, AMProductVersion, NISSignatureLastUpdated, QuickScanAge, FullScanAge | Format-List")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-MpThreat | Select-Object ThreatName, SeverityID, ActionSuccess, InitialDetectionTime | Format-Table -AutoSize 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 30")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-MpThreatDetection | Select-Object ThreatID, ActionSuccess, CurrentThreatExecutionStatusID, InitialDetectionTime, LastThreatStatusChangeTime, RemediationTime, Resources | Format-List")
Bash(powershell -Command '$input | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Self | Select-Object HostName, DNSName, TailscaleIPs, ExitNode, ExitNodeOption, AdvertisedRoutes | Format-List')
